title: Tau 3 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa - Ministry of Education
content:
## Tau 3 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa
Information to help you understand what your child learns in Tau 3 at kura, and ideas for helping them with their learning at home.

We’re inviting whānau to share their feedback on the Parent Portal to help us improve the information and support we provide. Take a few minutes to complete our short survey.
Parent Portal survey – Survey Monkey
- Pāngarau – Tau 3 Tēnā koutou e te whānau. Nei rā ngā hau o mihi e pupuhi ana! Hei tautāwhi tēnei rauemi i a koutou ki te hāpai i te ako a ā tātou mokopuna i te Pāngarau hei te mutunga o te Tau 3 ki te kura. Find out more
